page.title: Work & education
page.summary: A reverse-chronological trace of what I've done, why, and what I took away. Industry work, degrees, and one peer-reviewed publication — the resume, longer.
roles.optum.title: Software Engineer
roles.optum.summary: Built and maintained an enterprise C# / .NET healthcare data platform managing provider records for thousands of US medical professionals.
roles.optum.bullets.0: Led design proposals to modernize a legacy provider-data system, improving maintainability and cutting technical debt on a business-critical service.
roles.optum.bullets.1: Collaborated cross-functionally with product managers and engineers in agile teams to deliver features aligned with business requirements.
roles.optum.bullets.2: Proposed and presented an AI/ML-driven AutoML approach for automating model creation and hyperparameter tuning at the Optum Global Hackathon.
roles.internSummer.title: Summer Intern
roles.internSummer.summary: Full-stack development in .NET and Java Spring Boot inside a collaborative agile team.
roles.internIIT.title: Engineering Intern
roles.internIIT.summary: Built a WebRTC application for video conferencing and content sharing on bandwidth-constrained networks, with STUN/TURN peer connectivity at near-zero cost. Frontend components in Vue.js.
degrees.msc.title: MSc, Erasmus Mundus Joint Masters in Imaging
degrees.msc.summary: Specializing in Image Modelling and Data-Intensive Imaging.
degrees.btech.title: B.Tech, Computer Science & Engineering
publications.rnn.title: Improving performance of Recurrent Neural Networks for Question-Answering with Attention-based Context Reduction
